commands_run: cd form/form-kernel-rust && git show origin/main:deploy/front-door/api.bml > /tmp/origin-main-repair-api.bml && ./target/release/form-kernel-rust check --routes /tmp/origin-main-repair-api.bml --stdlib ../form-stdlib
failure_reason: Repaired the native contributors page projection after public release showed native headers with total=169 and items=[]. The BML fallback UUID recipe now uses md5(id::text), matching Postgres md5(text) for UUID graph node ids. Public and Hostinger deploy checks now require contributor row objects when total is nonzero, so the empty-page regression cannot pass canary again. The full catalog check still reports the same 14 unresolved names on origin/main and this branch.
